About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in FUWAY, which ranks #1 with a dominant score of 92.8 and displays explosive long-term momentum across all timeframes—particularly its 1,120.81% 10-year return and 719.56% 5-year return, both vastly exceeding SPY by 886.18% and 643.85% respectively. FUWAY shows perfect technical alignment with all four major moving averages above price, a "clean" momentum signal, and a "strong_buy" flag, though its 5.76x ratio between 3-month and 1-month returns suggests highly concentrated recent gains. In contrast, NOC (Northrop Grumman) at rank 2 presents a more measured profile with solid but modest returns—55.60% over 1 year and 286.91% over 10 years—delivering consistent performance with all moving averages aligned and strong ratio passes, yet only marginally beating SPY. The correlation data shows FUWAY aligns most with commodities and materials (IAU at 0.204, XLB at 0.164), while both stocks are negatively correlated with bonds and defensive healthcare, suggesting they thrive in risk-on environments.
